edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips represent discrete regime-change events, not incremental signals. When SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips AND ADX_14 > 30, the market has committed to a new directional phase. By requiring a high ADX threshold (30 vs the template default of 20), we filter out ambiguous transitions and only enter during strong momentum ignition. The edge is structural: ATR-based trailing stops in Supertrend adapt to volatility, meaning entries are already calibrated to current conditions. Wide stops (3.0-3.5x ATR) and very wide TP (5.0-6.0x ATR) exploit the fact that strong-trend entries tend to produce outsized moves. Trade frequency should be very low (~50-100 trades), directly addressing the fee drag problem (currently 62% of gross profit on the best ema_rsi_atr lead).
regime_assumption: Requires strong trending regimes (ADX > 30). Invalidates in ranging/low-ADX markets where Supertrend whipsaws. ETH/4h shows consistent trending edge (PF=1.054) making it the primary target. Strategy should be suspended if ADX spends >70% of test window below 25.
invalidation_conditions: Average ADX during test period < 22 (market too range-bound for trend entries)
Trade count < 20 (insufficient sample for statistical significance)
Fee drag > 50% of gross profit (stops too tight or trades too frequent)
Ranging regime PF > trending regime PF (edge hypothesis inverted)

variants.name: supertrend_ignition_strong
variants.description: High-conviction Supertrend entries requiring ADX > 30. Very wide stops (3.5 ATR) and TP (6.0 ATR) to capture full impulse legs. Tests whether strong-trend-only entries produce outsized wins that overcome the low win rate.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 30 for strong trending regime confirmation.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 30 for strong trending regime confirmation.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 20 (trend exhaustion).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (40 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Supertrend whipsaw during ADX decline
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Late entry at trend exhaustion after extended move
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry (wide stop for trend persistence).
Take profit at 6.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.7:1 R:R).
Rationale: Wide stops let trends breathe; few entries reduce fee drag.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as regime-change entry

variants.name: supertrend_ignition_moderate
variants.description: Moderate Supertrend entries at ADX > 25. Tighter risk (2.5 ATR stop, 4.0 TP) for more trades at smaller R:R. Control variant to test whether the ADX=30 threshold in variant 1 filters too aggressively.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 for trending regime confirmation.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 for trending regime confirmation.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 18 (trend weakening).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (30 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Supertrend whipsaw during ADX decline
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Choppy price action around Supertrend level
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.6:1 R:R).

variants.name: supertrend_ignition_eth1h
variants.description: Supertrend on ETH/1h targeting ranging-to-trending transitions. ADX > 25 with moderate risk. Tests whether Supertrend captures the ranging-edge (PF=1.115) on shorter timeframe by detecting breakouts from ranges.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flip from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h noise causing rapid Supertrend flips
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout from range returning to mean
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (tighter for 1h TF).
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.75:1 R:R).
